# CWE-93 negative: CRLF stripped from header input (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-93-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

// CWE-93 Improper Neutralization of CRLF Sequences (mitigated)
func SendContinueRedirect(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodGet {
		http.Error(w, "method", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	returnURL := r.URL.Query().Get("return")
	if returnURL == "" {
		returnURL = "/home"
	}
	returnURL = strings.ReplaceAll(returnURL, "\r", "")
	returnURL = strings.ReplaceAll(returnURL, "\n", "")
	base := "https://portal.example/auth?next="
	w.Header().Set("Location", base+returnURL)
	w.Header().Set("Cache-Control", "no-store")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusFound)
}
